title: Bitter Velvety Argentinian Avocado Hass Salad
description: This festive dish features bitter and velvety avocado hass pulp, braised with a touch of sugar-free-friendly sweetness to create a unique festive treat.

ingredients.name: 1 ripe Hass avocado
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is at room temperature

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons sugar-free honey syrup or agave nectar

instructions: Peel the avocado and use a spoon to scoop out its flesh. Squeeze in some honey syrup.
Add minced garlic and salt to the flesh, then mix well until it becomes slightly soft and velvety.
Place the mixture in a small baking dish or shallow pan lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top and cooked through. Keep an eye on it to prevent burning.
